---
title: "Ameek Bhalla Résumé"
author: Ameek Bhalla
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ["css/custom.css"]
    self_contained: false
knit: pagedown::chrome_print
---
<!-- Focus on relevant accomplishments and skills related to the position you seek. -->

<!-- Omit irrelevant items such as full list of publications  -->

<!-- May include mentoring experience section -->

<!-- ——— -->
<!-- Use following prompts in chatGPT -->

<!-- - "Let me know 5-10 skills based on this description"  -->
<!-- [make sure to match exact job description: if the JD asks for "flow cytometry", don't write "FACS"]  -->

<!-- - "What is the following cover letter missing" -->

<!-- - Give me interview 8-10 questions based on the description  -->


# Aside

<!-- ![Lijia Yu](https://avatars1.githubusercontent.com/u/895125?s=400&v=4){width=80%} -->

<!-- ## Contact {#contact} -->

<!--.* <i class="fa fa-map-marked-alt"></i> New Delhi, India -->

<i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> [bhalla.ameek\@gmail.com](mailto:bhalla.ameek@gmail.com){.email}\
<i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> [linkedin.com/in/ameekbhalla](https://linkedin.com/in/ameekbhalla) 
<!-- - <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/ameekbhalla](https://github.com/ameekbhalla)-->
<!-- - <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> +91 __________ -->
<!-- - <i class="fas fa-globe"></i> [ameekbhalla.netlify.app](https://ameekbhalla.netlify.app) -->

## <i class="fa fa-laptop"></i> Data Science Skills {data-icon="laptop"}

**1. Single-cell analysis**  
    • Integration (Seurat)  
    • Pseudobulk (DESeq2)  
    • Cell annotation (SingleR)  

**2. Evolutionary analysis**  
    • Phylogenetic reconstruction  
    • Tests of selection  

**3. Multi-omics integration**  
    • PCA, t-SNE, UMAP  
    • Network analysis  
    • Factor analysis (MOFA2)  

**4. Statistical modeling & ML**  
    • Regularized GLMs  
    • Mixed models (lme4)  
    • Survival analysis (Cox, Weibull)  

**5. Languages & tools**  
    • R  
    • Linux/Bash  
    • Git  

## <i class="fa fa-users"></i> Human multi-omics

 • 100 patients, 4 time points  
 • scRNA-seq: 42,000 PBMCs  
 • Plasma proteomics: 460 proteins  
 • Metabolomics: 1,244 metabolites  
 • Flow cytometry: 41 cell types  

## <i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i> Experimental skills

**1. Mol bio & Transcriptomics**  
    • Bulk RNA-seq  
    • Cloning  
    • qPCR  
    • Western blotting  

**2. Experimental design**  
    • Repeated measures  
    • Factorial designs  
    • Pseudoreplication control  

<!-- 4. Genetic systems -->
<!-- • Drosophila crosses -->
<!-- • GAL4-UAS system -->

<!-- -   **Epidemology** <br />            meta-analyses, <br />            case-control studies, <br />            longitudinal studies <br />  -->
<!-- -   **Quantitative Genetics** <br />            GWAS,  <br />            twin studies -->

<!-- Interests {data-icon=pencil-ruler} -->
<!-- -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -->

<!-- __Popular science__: evolutionary biology, personality psychology -->

<!-- __Philosophy__: critical rationalism -->

<!-- __Communication__: clear writing, data visualization -->

## Disclaimer {#disclaimer}

<!-- Résumé  -->

Built with <i class="fab fa-r-project"></i>\
<!-- [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/ameekbhalla/cv)\ -->
Last updated `r Sys.Date()`

# Main

## Ameek Bhalla {#title}

## Research Profile {data-icon="id-card"}

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

Expertise: single-cell analysis, multi-omics, and AI/ML.

N/A

N/A

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

Current focus: human disease biology and biomarker discovery.

N/A

N/A

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

Broad interests: quantitative genomics and precision medicine.

N/A

N/A

## Experience (Academia) {data-icon="suitcase"}

### Institute for Systems Biology, Seattle

*Postdoctoral Fellow (Computational Biology)*

N/A <!-- New Delhi -->

Present - 2022 <!-- Add context introducing past employers https://youtu.be/NcD3nufvA7Y?si=nX_mriJC8hkO4dZj&t=176 -->

- Developed and validated models to diagnose Lyme disease using deep-phenotyping data.
- Integrated scRNA-seq, proteomics, metabolomics, and flow cytometry data from a human cohort to enable deep phenotyping of Lyme disease.  

### Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology, New Delhi

*Graduate Research Assistant (Computational Genomics)*

N/A <!-- New Delhi -->

2022 - 2015 

- Implemented statistical pipelines for large-scale transcriptomic analyses that contributed to three research publications.
- Designed and executed experiments to generate large-scale data to infer the heritability of metabolic traits in animal models.

## Experience (Industry) {data-icon="suitcase"}

### Cureus Journal of Medical Science, Springer Nature

*Statistical Editor (Medical Science)*

N/A <!-- Palo Alto (remote) -->

2022 - 2020

- Evaluated study design, statistical analysis, and reporting rigor in more than 700 medical manuscripts for Cureus.

### Editage

*Freelance consultant: scientific reporting*

N/A <!-- Palo Alto (remote) -->

2020 - 2019

- Helped researchers communicate methods, results, and limitations clearly for publication and present figures effectively.


## Education {data-icon="graduation-cap"}

### Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology, New Delhi

*PhD in Computational Biology*

N/A <!-- New Delhi -->

2022

<!-- ### Punjab Technical University -->

<!-- MSc, Biotechnology -->

<!-- New Delhi, India -->

<!-- 2013 -->

<!-- ### University of Delhi -->

<!-- *Postgraduate Diploma, Biochemical Technology* -->

<!-- N/A <!-- New Delhi -->

<!-- 2007 - 2006 -->

### University of Delhi
 
*BSc (Hons), double major in Biomedical Sciences & Biotechnology*

N/A <!-- New Delhi -->

2007

## Selected Publications {data-icon="book"}

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

[Multiomics Reveals Compartmentalized Immune Responses and Tissue-Vascular Signatures in Lyme Disease](https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.05.27.656061)\
Rostomily C, **Bhalla A**, et al. bioRxiv. 2025. Under review.

N/A

2025

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

[Phenotypic cross-species conservation and cross-generation directionality switching in epigenetic inheritance](https://doi.org/10.1111/mec.16969)\
**Bhalla A**, and Sharma A. Mol Ecol. 2023 Jul.

N/A

2023

### 

<!-- A line break was introduced in the following title to force "with" into the next line  -->

[Paternal inheritance of diet induced metabolic traits correlates with germline regulation of diet induced coding gene expression](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ygeno.2019.04.008)\
Teltumbade M, **Bhalla A**, and Sharma A. Genomics. 2020 Jan.

N/A

2020
